next_prs.controlled_import_required: Use controlled_import_manifest.candidate_slugs as the next reviewed-workbook import/cache-refresh input only after explicit production write approval.
next_prs.cache_stale_boundary: Public API evidence alone cannot prove stale cache versus missing/unpublished CMS asset. Any cache-stale claim requires a separate read-only target cache/DB check or a controlled forget/warm run.
